title: Slow-cooker mushroom stroganoff
subtitle: Mixed mushrooms with soured cream and Dijon mustard
excerpt: Chestnut and portobello mushrooms slow-cooked with onion, garlic, Dijon mustard, and paprika in vegetable stock for four hours, then stirred with soured cream at the end. The mushrooms absorb and concentrate in the slow cooker. Serve over rice or egg noodles.
sourceNotes: Mushroom stroganoff is the standard vegetarian adaptation of beef stroganoff, following the same sauce base of stock, mustard, and soured cream. Chestnut mushrooms hold their shape and provide a savoury depth; portobello mushrooms contribute more body and colour. The slow cooker produces a more intensely flavoured result than a quick pan version because the mushrooms have time to release their liquid and then reabsorb the seasoned stock.

recipe.makeAheadNotes: Cook the mushroom base the day before. Reheat gently and stir in fresh soured cream before serving.

content.text: The soured cream splits if the pot is still bubbling when it goes in. Switch the slow cooker off, wait 5 minutes for the liquid to stop simmering, then stir the soured cream through. The residual heat is enough to warm it without curdling it.

Add the {{mushrooms-chestnut}}, {{mushrooms-portobello}}, {{onion}}, {{garlic}}, {{dijon-mustard}}, {{smoked-paprika}}, {{tomato-puree}}, {{soy-sauce-light}}, {{sea-salt-fine}}, and {{black-pepper}} to the slow cooker. Pour over the {{stock-vegetable}} and stir to combine. Cook on low for 4 hours, until the mushrooms are tender and the sauce is deep and well-seasoned. Switch off. Wait 5 minutes, then stir through the {{soured-cream}} until smooth. Taste and adjust seasoning. Serve immediately.

items.symptom: Soured cream has split into grainy curds
items.cause: Added to a pot that was still simmering
items.fix: Always wait until the pot is fully off and has cooled slightly. Full-fat soured cream is more stable than low-fat. Stir gently rather than vigorously

items.cause: Mushrooms released a lot of water
items.fix: Remove the lid and cook on high for 15 to 20 minutes to reduce before adding the soured cream

items.cause: Undercooked, or the cooker runs cool
items.fix: Continue for another 30 to 60 minutes. Mushrooms should be completely yielding and soft, having collapsed and concentrated

content.text: Mushroom stroganoff is a quick-to-build vegetarian weeknight dinner. The four-hour cook time is the shortest in the slow-cooker savoury section. Serve over rice or egg noodles with a green salad. The soy sauce provides the depth that Worcestershire sauce would in the meat version — without the anchovies.
